candidates.why: Represents the primary top-line revenue figure; matches Total Revenue numerically but is the more standard label for sales.
Also a valid top-line figure but appears to be a duplicate total of Revenues; prefer the base component label when duplicates exist.
This is a cost line, not revenue, so inappropriate for REVT.
This is a cost of goods sold line, not revenue.
Describes non-revenue operating income; not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Revenues and Total Revenue have identical values; selected the non-total label per instruction to prefer component over duplicate total.

candidates.why: Generic COGS label but appears unused (all preview values nan); still conceptually valid.
Explicitly labeled as COGS; good semantic match although preview values are nan.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Standard COGS description including services; best semantic fit for direct costs, despite nan preview values.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: Chose the most descriptive and standard direct cost label among the available COGS-type rows.

candidates.why: A classic SG&A component representing personnel/overhead costs, not COGS.
Overhead/operating expenses bucket; fits SG&A and is not labeled as a total.
Explicit SG&A line; although populated mainly in one year, rules say to include this and overhead buckets when SG&A appears sparse.

variables.notes: An explicit SG&A row exists but is only populated in part of the preview, so per instructions it is included together with the relevant overhead buckets (Personnel Expenses and Other Operating Expenses). Totals/subtotals were avoided.
No R&D-related candidate rows were provided; treat R&D as absent/zero per instructions.

candidates.why: Includes interest but is a broader net finance expense; prefer the more specific interest expense line if available.
Most direct and specific interest expense line, excluding other financial items; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities only; a subset of total interest expense, so not chosen as the main XINT measure.

candidates.row_label: Interest and Other Financial Expense rest
candidates.why: Residual finance expense; too vague and incomplete relative to Interest expenses.
Represents minority shareholders’ share of profit, not an interest expense.
Same as Non-controlling interest; not a finance cost line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure for lease interest only; not the full interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not the period’s interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders; not interest expense.
Same as Non-controlling interests; equity, not expense.
Debt principal, not interest expense.
Accrued liability for interest, not the full period expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the specific Income Statement line for interest expenses rather than broader or partial finance cost lines.

candidates.why: Income statement item; not an equity balance.
Represents profit attributable to equity holders, not the equity stock balance.
Component of shareholders’ equity (retained and other reserves), not total equity.
Represents total equity attributable to shareholders (excluding non-controlling interests); appropriate for book equity for common shareholders.
Includes both shareholders’ equity and non-controlling interests; broader than common equity needed for BE since MIB is modeled separately.

variables.notes: Chose shareholders’ equity attributable to owners, excluding non-controlling interests, consistent with MIB being modeled separately.

candidates.why: Flow of profit attributable to NCI, but MIB is defined as minority interest balance; prefer balance sheet line for stock measure.
Same as income statement non-controlling interest; a flow, not stock.
Represents the balance of equity attributable to non-controlling interests; best match for minority interest (MIB).
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests with same figures; either would work but one is sufficient.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet stock measure of non-controlling interests for MIB; did not duplicate with the synonymous Minority Interest row.
